EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriSpatialRelationEnum

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Spatial relationship types - includes those defined by the OpenGIS Simple Features Specification For OLE/COM, Revision 1.1

[Guid("9E37F386-151C-47EC-996B-618EE93924D0")]
public enum esriSpatialRelationEnum

Fields

esriSpatialRelationCross = 9

9: The interiors of two lines intersect in a point, or the interiors of a line and polygon intersect in a line.

esriSpatialRelationDisjoint = 0

0: Disjoint.

esriSpatialRelationIn = 3

3: OpenGIS relationship 'in' - disallows polyline on boundary of polygon.

esriSpatialRelationInteriorIntersection = 2

2: Intersection excluding boundary touch

esriSpatialRelationIntersection = 1

1: Interior intersection or boundary touch, same as 'not disjoint'.

esriSpatialRelationLineCoincidence = 8

8: Boundary intersection is of dimension one. Interiors may or may not intersect.

esriSpatialRelationLineTouch = 6

6: Boundary intersection is of dimension one and interiors are disjoint.

esriSpatialRelationOverlap = 10

10: Two lines share a common sub-line, or two areas share a common sub-area.

esriSpatialRelationPointTouch = 5

5: Boundary intersection is of dimension zero and interiors are disjoint.

esriSpatialRelationRelation = 11

11: Allows specification of any relationship in the Dimension Extended Nine Intersection Model.

esriSpatialRelationTouch = 7

7: Point-touch or line-touch (OpenGIS touch relationship).

esriSpatialRelationWithin = 4

4: Same as esriSpatialRelationIn; but in addition, geometry can be on boundary.

Made with docfx
